name: @firstpick/pi-skill-test-plan-generator
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill when planning tests from specs, architecture docs, PRs, risky changes, new features, bug fixes, or release work. Generates prioritized unit, integration, E2E, regression, and edge-case coverage.
description_zh: 代理在从规范、架构文档、PR、有风险更改、新功能、错误修复或发布工作中规划测试时应调用此技能。生成优先级排序的单元测试、集成测试、端到端测试、回归测试和边界用例覆盖
